name: llm-wiki-agent
description: Initialize and maintain cross-platform LLM Wiki knowledge bases.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize and maintain portable LLM Wiki knowledge bases.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex-facing workflows for bootstrapping, syncing, diagnosing, and upgrading LLM Wiki agent assets across Codex, Claude Code, Trae, OpenCode, OpenClaw, and Hermes.
defaultPrompt: Initialize an LLM Wiki in a new folder.
Check my LLM Wiki for platform drift.
Upgrade my LLM Wiki runtime assets.
